task_summary: Validated and updated documentation for the standalone page creation FK fix. PagesService.create was reordered to insert the parent standalone_pages row (with currentRevisionId = null) before the child page_revisions row, satisfying fk_page_revisions_page_id. The Documenter updated the create() JSDoc to state the FK-aware three-step insert order as an explicit guarantee. docs/README.md accurately describes the external API behavior and required no changes.
commands_run: npx --yes pnpm@10.0.0 --filter @sfus/api exec vitest run src/pages/pages.service.test.ts
final_test_outcomes: pages.service.test.ts: 38 passed, 0 failed (1 new for FK insert order)
full suite: 262 passed, 6 pre-existing failures in navigation.controller.test.ts (unrelated)
acceptance_criteria: PASS: Creating a standalone page via POST /api/pages/admin/standalone-pages succeeds and creates both a parent standalone_pages row and a child page_revisions row in correct FK order, with no foreign-key constraint violation.
PASS: The created page is retrievable via GET /api/pages/<id>/revisions or similar queries that traverse the FK.
PASS: Existing page creation tests pass without modification (the fix is FK order only, no API contract or behavior changes).
implementation_context: Implementer commits: e05440f (fix: insert standalone_pages before page_revisions to satisfy FK)
Tester commits: ac71ca1 (test: add FK insert-order test), f983dea (chore: tester success artifacts)
Documenter commit: 293cd92 (docs: JSDoc FK-aware insert order guarantee in PagesService.create)
plan_context: Documentation Impact per plan: none required beyond accuracy; if docs/README.md describes the page-create flow keep it accurate.
docs/README.md was reviewed and accurately describes the external POST /api/pages/admin/pages behavior — no changes needed.
pages-client.ts error-surfacing fix was not in scope for this subtask (not implemented).
convention_guidance: Repository uses JSDoc on all exported methods in service files (see pages.service.ts, blog.service.ts).
Inline comments document implementation-specific constraints (FK ordering, auth gates) within method bodies.
docs/README.md is the canonical home for external API surface documentation per AGENTS.md.
assumptions: pages-client.ts error-surfacing fix was out of scope for this subtask as confirmed by Implementer report and actual diff.
